arxiv.title: GalaxiesML: a dataset of galaxy images, photometry, redshifts, and structural parameters for machine learning
arxiv.abstract: We present a dataset built for machine learning applications consisting of galaxy photometry, images, spectroscopic redshifts, and structural properties. arxiv.title: Procedure-Aware Surgical Video-language Pretraining with Hierarchical Knowledge Augmentation
arxiv.abstract: Surgical video-language pretraining (VLP) faces unique challenges due to the knowledge domain gap and the scarcity of multi-modal data. arxiv.abstract: Learning-based methods have achieved strong performance for quadrupedal locomotion. arxiv.abstract: Social media images provide valuable insights for modeling, mapping, and understanding human interactions with natural and cultural heritage. arxiv.title: Comprehensive Performance Modeling and System Design Insights for Foundation Models
arxiv.abstract: Generative AI, in particular large transformer models, are increasingly driving HPC system design in science and industry. arxiv.title: ImmersePro: End-to-End Stereo Video Synthesis Via Implicit Disparity Learning
arxiv.abstract: We introduce \textit{ImmersePro}, an innovative framework specifically designed to transform single-view videos into stereo videos. arxiv.title: Possible Principles for Aligned Structure Learning Agents
arxiv.abstract: This paper offers a roadmap for the development of scalable aligned artificial intelligence (AI) from first principle descriptions of natural intelligence. arxiv.title: Enhanced Credit Score Prediction Using Ensemble Deep Learning Model
arxiv.abstract: In contemporary economic society, credit scores are crucial for every participant.
